M11 = 0.1004961651 - 0.0006703737515*sin(2*theta3) - 0.0008962522540*cos(2*theta3)

M12 = 0.09972364415 - 0.0006703737515*sin(2*theta3) - 0.0008962522540*cos(2*theta3)

M13 = 0.001209433405*sin(theta3) + 0.003636162552*cos(theta3)



M21 = 0.09972364415 - 0.0006703737515*sin(2*theta3) - 0.0008962522540*cos(2*theta3)

M22 = 0.09972364415 - 0.0006703737515*sin(2*theta3) - 0.0008962522540*cos(2*theta3)

M23 = 0.001209433405*sin(theta3) + 0.003636162552*cos(theta3)



M31 = 0.001209433405*sin(theta3) + 0.003636162552*cos(theta3)

M32 = 0.001209433405*sin(theta3) + 0.003636162552*cos(theta3)

M33 = (-0.1367884775*cos(theta2)^2 + 0.003652995632*cos(theta2)*sin(theta2) + 0.06839423877)*cos(theta1)^2 + (0.003652995632*cos(theta2)^2 + 0.1367884775*cos(theta2)*sin(theta2) - 0.001826497816)*sin(theta1)*cos(theta1) - 0.001826497816*cos(theta2)*sin(theta2) + 0.06839423877*cos(theta2)^2 + 0.002238453992
